detaileddescription.para: Critical sections for thread safe operation of CurrencyCodeToCurrencyListMap
Instance of the subsystem that created this interface

memberdef.name: DEFINE_ONLINE_PLAYER_DELEGATE_THREE_PARAM

briefdescription.para: Get a record (arbitrary JSON data) by its key in user-level.

parameterdescription.para: Index of user that is attempting to get record
The record key to delete

briefdescription.para: Get a record (arbitrary JSON data) by its key in user-level. Only for request by Game Server.

parameterdescription.para: Index of user that is attempting to get record
The record key to delete
The UserId of the record owner

briefdescription.para: Get a public record (arbitrary JSON data) by its key in user-level.

parameterdescription.para: Index of user that is attempting to get record
The record key to delete

briefdescription.para: Get a public record (arbitrary JSON data) by its key in user-level.

parameterdescription.para: Index of user that is attempting to get record
The record key to delete
The UserId of the record owner

briefdescription.para: Replace a record in user-level. If the record doesn't exist, it will create and save the record. If already exists, it will replace the existing one.

parameterdescription.para: Index of user that is attempting to get record
The record key to replace
Record to replace in the form of Json object

briefdescription.para: Replace a record in user-level. If the record doesn't exist, it will create and save the record. If already exists, it will replace the existing one.

parameterdescription.para: Index of user that is attempting to get record
The record key to replace
Record to replace in the form of Json object

briefdescription.para: Delete a record under the given key in user-level.

parameterdescription.para: Index of user that is attempting to get record
The record key to delete

memberdef.argsstring: (int32 LocalUserNum, const FString &Key, const TArray< FString > &UserIds)
memberdef.name: BulkGetPublicUserRecord

briefdescription.para: Get a public record (arbitrary JSON data) by its key and userId in user-level.

parameterdescription.para: Index of user that is attempting to get bulk public user record
Key of record.
List UserId(s) of the record owner.

memberdef.argsstring: (int32 LocalUserNum, const FString &Key, const TArray< FUniqueNetIdAccelByteUserRef > &UniqueNetIds)
memberdef.name: BulkGetPublicUserRecord

briefdescription.para: Get a public record (arbitrary JSON data) by its key and userId in user-level.

parameterdescription.para: Index of user that is attempting to get bulk public user record
Key of record.
List UniqueNetId(UserId)(s) of the record owner.

briefdescription.para: Get a record by its key in namespace-level.

parameterdescription.para: Index of user that is attempting to get game record
The record key to get

briefdescription.para: Get a record by its key in namespace-level from cache.

parameterdescription.para: Index of user that is attempting to get game record
The record key to get

briefdescription.para: Replace a record by its key in namespace-level.

parameterdescription.para: Index of user that is attempting to get game record
The record key to get
Record to replace in the form of Json object

detaileddescription.para: Convenience method to get an instance of this interface from the subsystem passed in.

parameterdescription.para: Subsystem instance that we wish to get this interface from
Instance of the interface that we got from the subsystem, or nullptr if not found

simplesect.para: boolean that is true if we could get an instance of the interface, false otherwise

detaileddescription.para: Convenience method to get an instance of this interface from the subsystem associated with the world passed in.

parameterdescription.para: World instance that we wish to get the interface from
Instance of the interface that we got from the subsystem, or nullptr if not found

simplesect.para: boolean that is true if we could get an instance of the interface, false otherwise

detaileddescription.para: Hidden default constructor, the constructor that takes in a subsystem instance should be used instead.

memberdef.name: GetUserRecord

detaileddescription.para: Implementation of Cloud Save service from AccelByte services
